summary: Comprehensive testing of Staff Management UI and TOTP bootstrap flow completed. Backend: 23/23 tests passed. Frontend: All critical flows verified including self-protection rules, sidebar visibility, and access control.
critical_code_review_comments: Staff login TOTP bootstrap correctly returns totp_secret_b32, totp_uri, qr_code_url for first-time users
Staff verify-totp correctly sets auth cookies and returns user with role
GET /api/admin/staff-users correctly requires super_admin role (403 for sales/client)
POST /api/admin/staff-users correctly creates staff with temp_password
Creating super_admin role via API correctly returns 422 validation error
Self-protection rules work: reset-password/reset-totp/deactivate/delete on self returns 400
Deactivated users correctly get 403 on next request with 'Акаунтът е деактивиран' message
Soft-delete correctly anonymizes email to deleted+{id}@begestates.bg
Last super_admin guard exists in code (prevents deactivating/deleting last active super_admin)
Frontend sidebar correctly shows 'Служители' link only for super_admin role
Frontend staff table correctly shows 'Вие' marker for current user
Frontend correctly hides destructive buttons for self row (only edit button visible)
Frontend 'Нов служител' dialog correctly shows temp password after creation
Sales user accessing /admin/staff-users gets 403 toast and empty table
Client login regression test passes - profile endpoint works
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Using existing seeded users.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Staff Management UI complete and tested. All endpoints working: staff CRUD, reset-password, reset-totp, deactivate/activate, soft-delete. Self-protection rules enforced in both backend (400 errors) and frontend (hidden buttons). Last super_admin guard prevents deactivating/deleting the last active super_admin. Sidebar 'Служители' link only visible for super_admin. Sales/client users get 403 when accessing /admin/staff-users.
verified_features: BACKEND: POST /api/auth/staff/login returns temp_token + requires_totp/requires_totp_setup flags
BACKEND: First-time staff login returns totp_secret_b32, totp_uri, qr_code_url in response
BACKEND: POST /api/auth/staff/verify-totp with valid code returns user + sets cookies
BACKEND: POST /api/auth/staff/verify-totp with invalid code returns 401
BACKEND: GET /api/admin/staff-users as super_admin returns staff list with correct structure
BACKEND: GET /api/admin/staff-users as sales returns 403
BACKEND: GET /api/admin/staff-users as client returns 403
BACKEND: POST /api/admin/staff-users creates staff with temp_password
BACKEND: POST /api/admin/staff-users with duplicate email returns 409
BACKEND: POST /api/admin/staff-users with role=super_admin returns 422
BACKEND: PATCH /api/admin/staff-users/{id} updates staff fields
BACKEND: POST /api/admin/staff-users/{self_id}/reset-password returns 400
BACKEND: POST /api/admin/staff-users/{self_id}/reset-totp returns 400
BACKEND: POST /api/admin/staff-users/{self_id}/deactivate returns 400
BACKEND: DELETE /api/admin/staff-users/{self_id} returns 400
BACKEND: Deactivated user gets 403 'Акаунтът е деактивиран' on next request
BACKEND: POST /api/admin/staff-users/{id}/activate reactivates user
BACKEND: DELETE /api/admin/staff-users/{id} soft-deletes and anonymizes email
BACKEND: Last super_admin guard prevents deactivating/deleting last active super_admin
BACKEND: POST /api/admin/staff-users/{id}/reset-password returns new temp_password
BACKEND: POST /api/admin/staff-users/{id}/reset-totp clears totp_setup_completed
BACKEND: POST /api/auth/client/login works (regression test)
FRONTEND: Staff login page loads with email/password form
FRONTEND: TOTP step 2 appears after password verification
FRONTEND: Admin redirected to /admin after successful TOTP verification
FRONTEND: Sidebar shows 'Служители' link for super_admin
FRONTEND: Sidebar hides 'Служители' link for sales role
FRONTEND: Staff users page shows 'Управление на екипа' title
FRONTEND: Staff table shows 'Вие' marker for current user
FRONTEND: Destructive buttons hidden for self row (only edit visible)
FRONTEND: 'Нов служител' dialog opens and creates staff
FRONTEND: Temp password dialog shows generated password
FRONTEND: Sales user accessing /admin/staff-users gets 403 toast
